summary:
Claim: Polymerization continues significantly for up to 72 hours.  
Evidence: - Light-cured composites undergo rapid initial polymerization followed by near-complete setting within minutes. - Post-polymerization reactions are minor and clinically insignificant beyond ~60 minutes.  
Answer: C
